# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against `master`, read `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` end-to-end, and ran the targeted timeout-path tests plus `cargo test adapters::process_backend -- --nocapture`. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in this change.

## Amendments

None.
